US gaming industry groups urge Senate to ban sports prediction markets in crypto bill: report
news.summary: US gaming groups called on Congress to ban sports and casino-style prediction markets in a crypto market structure bill, Semafor reported.

news.title: Illinois governor approves crypto transaction tax despite industry uproar
news.summary: “There is effectively no comparable state financial transaction tax on stocks, bonds or derivatives anywhere in the country,” said a16z general counsel Miles Jennings.

news.title: Hyperliquid open interest surges 32% in a week: Is $80 HYPE next?
